_comment: Copy to settings.local.json and adjust. Do not commit settings.local.json.

PreToolUse._comment: Block reading secret files. Copy this pattern to settings.local.json.

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,os; p=json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''); blocked=['.env','.pem','.key','.p12','.mobileprovision']; exit(2 if any(p.endswith(b) for b in blocked) else 0)"

PostToolUse._comment: Reminder to type-check after edits. Not enforced — informational only.
